jd_text: Creatio Technical Lead / Solution Architect We’re working with a leading organisation undergoing a major digital transformation, looking to bring in a Creatio Technical Lead to drive solution design and delivery across their CRM and workflow automation landscape. This is a key role where you’ll take ownership of architecture, development, and platform best practices while working closely with business stakeholders to deliver scalable, high-impact solutions. What you’ll be doing: Lead end-to-end solution design, development, and customization on the Creatio platform Define and own the technical architecture, ensuring best practices and coding standards Work closely with business teams to gather requirements and translate them into scalable solutions Oversee system integrations and ensure seamless data flow across platforms Conduct code reviews, mentor developers, and provide technical leadership Ensure performance, scalability, and security compliance across the platform Support deployments, troubleshooting, and environment management What we’re looking for: 9+ years of experience in CRM / low-code platforms Strong hands-on experience with the Creatio platform Proven experience in technical leadership or architecture roles Solid understanding of system integrations and data architecture Experience working closely with business stakeholders Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in fast-paced environments
